text.en: Wasserstein GAN replaced the original GAN divergence with a distance inspired by optimal transport. The critic objective made training behavior easier to interpret and helped diagnose mode collapse and convergence problems.
text.zh: Wasserstein GAN 用受最优传输启发的距离替代原始 GAN 散度。critic 目标让训练行为更容易解释，也帮助诊断模式坍塌和收敛问题。
